languages.text: Угловатые трупы сливаются в тошнотворный узор переломанных костей и сухого мяса. Только извращенный разум ксеноса способен познать истинное значение жуткой экспозиции. Отряд наскоро изучает останки и не находит ничего, заслуживающего внимания.

traits.locale_text: Угловатые трупы сливаются в тошнотворный узор переломанных костей и сухого мяса. Только извращенный разум ксеноса способен познать истинное значение жуткой экспозиции. Отряд наскоро изучает останки и не находит ничего, заслуживающего внимания.

languages.text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.
languages.original_text: Угловатые трупы сливаются в тошнотворный узор переломанных костей и сухого мяса. Только извращенный разум ксеноса способен познать истинное значение жуткой экспозиции. Отряд наскоро изучает останки и не находит ничего, заслуживающего внимания.

traits.locale_text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

languages.text: 那些扭曲变形的尸体以碎骨和干肉拼出了一副令人作呕的图案。只有异形那扭曲的思维，才能理解这种恐怖陈列的真正含义。小队迅速检查了遗骸，但没发现什么值得注意的东西。
languages.original_text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

traits.locale_text: 那些扭曲变形的尸体以碎骨和干肉拼出了一副令人作呕的图案。只有异形那扭曲的思维，才能理解这种恐怖陈列的真正含义。小队迅速检查了遗骸，但没发现什么值得注意的东西。

languages.text: Unos cadáveres maltrechos forman un patrón repulsivo de huesos rotos y carne seca. Solo la mente retorcida de un xenos es capaz de entender el verdadero significado de esta exposición de pesadilla. El equipo examina rápidamente los restos y no encuentra nada digno de mención.
languages.original_text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

traits.locale_text: Unos cadáveres maltrechos forman un patrón repulsivo de huesos rotos y carne seca. Solo la mente retorcida de un xenos es capaz de entender el verdadero significado de esta exposición de pesadilla. El equipo examina rápidamente los restos y no encuentra nada digno de mención.

languages.text: Des cadavres difformes, dans un amas ignoble d'os brisés et de chair racornie. Seul l'esprit pervers d'un xénos serait en mesure de discerner la véritable signification de cette macabre création. L'escouade inspecte rapidement le corps et ne trouve rien de significatif.
languages.original_text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

traits.locale_text: Des cadavres difformes, dans un amas ignoble d'os brisés et de chair racornie. Seul l'esprit pervers d'un xénos serait en mesure de discerner la véritable signification de cette macabre création. L'escouade inspecte rapidement le corps et ne trouve rien de significatif.

languages.text: Çarpık cesetler, kırık kemikler ve kurumuş etlerden oluşan mide bulandırıcı bir desen oluşturuyor. Bu korkunç manzaranın gerçek anlamını yalnızca bir zenonun çarpık zihni algılayabilir. Manga, hızla kalıntıları inceliyor ve dikkate değer hiçbir şey bulamıyor.
languages.original_text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

traits.locale_text: Çarpık cesetler, kırık kemikler ve kurumuş etlerden oluşan mide bulandırıcı bir desen oluşturuyor. Bu korkunç manzaranın gerçek anlamını yalnızca bir zenonun çarpık zihni algılayabilir. Manga, hızla kalıntıları inceliyor ve dikkate değer hiçbir şey bulamıyor.

languages.text: Knotige Leichen bilden ein widerliches Muster aus gebrochenen Knochen und trockenem Fleisch. Nur der teuflische Verstand eines Xenos kann die wahre Bedeutung dieses grausamen Zurschaustellung erfassen. Der Trupp untersucht rasch die Überreste, ohne etwas Nennenswertes zu finden.
languages.original_text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

traits.locale_text: Knotige Leichen bilden ein widerliches Muster aus gebrochenen Knochen und trockenem Fleisch. Nur der teuflische Verstand eines Xenos kann die wahre Bedeutung dieses grausamen Zurschaustellung erfassen. Der Trupp untersucht rasch die Überreste, ohne etwas Nennenswertes zu finden.

languages.text: 枯れ果てた死体は、骨と肉が絡み合った不気味な模様を形成している。この惨状の真の意味を理解できるのは、異形の者の歪んだ心だけだ。部隊は遺体を迅速に調べ、特に興味深いものはないと判断する。
languages.original_text: Gnarled corpses form a stomach-churning pattern of broken bones and dried meat. Only the twisted mind of a xenos is capable of perceiving the true meaning of this gruesome display. The squad quickly examines the remains and finds nothing of note.

traits.locale_text: 枯れ果てた死体は、骨と肉が絡み合った不気味な模様を形成している。この惨状の真の意味を理解できるのは、異形の者の歪んだ心だけだ。部隊は遺体を迅速に調べ、特に興味深いものはないと判断する。
